THE SAMURAI P.S.
‣ The trick is to ask questions that are 	leading questions 	(either
from your best customers, friends… or get creative. : )
‣ 	Tie in the commonly asked questions, but be sure to use a Samurai-
style question at #2 or #3 at the latest.
‣ Examples of Samurai-style questions on the next slide.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

THE SAMURAI P.S.
Q: I’ve heard _______ works fast, but I’m concerned my life will change
too quickly. If I wanted to slow the progress down and pace my results,
would that be okay?
Q: My friend Sally used _____ and she (for weight loss) lost over 35
pounds REALLY fast. She looks and feels great. I’m concerned over how
FAST it happened. Is that normal? And if it happens to me, can I slow it
down a bit?
Q: I’ve read where some people (quite a few actually) said they
experience ______ as well as (primary goal.) Is that common?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

THE SAMURAI P.S.
Q: I just picked up _____ and I can’t believe how fast this works. Is that
common, or am I doing something out of the ordinary?
Q: A friend of mind tried ____ and he had an unusual reaction:
(something unusual but REALLY desired by your avatar.) Is that part of
the program’s benefits, or was he really lucky?
Q: One of my co-workers bought ____ and during the first week she lost
her dog. She said your customer service department was fantastic, and
even offered her money back due. What are your guarantee policies?
